Petition For Instructions To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Continued To Mar-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Michael Freedman for Robert Lem (Petitioner). Seth Skootsky for Patrick Lem (Trustee).

The Court indicated that the deadline for filing contests to the trust is still open and that there is no request to approve the accounting. Counsel presented oral argument in support of their positions with regard to order the sale of the real property, buy-out of Robert's share, having an independent appraiser to appraise the property, Trustee to exercise power per Article Sixth M of the Trust, accounting and final distribution. Mr. Skootsky stated that he will file a Petition for Approval of the Accounting through November 30, 2013 with the plan for final distribution by March 5, 2014. The Petition for Instructions, etc was continued to March 12, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status. The Court encouraged parties to agree on an independent appraiser to obtain a fair price for buy-out and to figure out a path to go forward.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Jan-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Robert Lem. Seth Skootsky for Patrick Lem (Trustee).

Mr. Freedman stated that his Client does not feel Pro Bono Mediation will be successful, that they just received an accounting and that the real property has been held in the Trust all this time for no good reasons that serve the Beneficiaries. Mr. Freedman also stated that his Client is not interested in a buyout, suggested that the Court order the Trustee to list the property for sale with distribution of the proceeds in three equal shares, that the only other solution is for the Trustee to distribute the property in kind which will result in a partition action and that it is a commercial property which leaves to much room for dispute. Mr. Skootsky suggested the petition be amended to agree that Patrick is the Trustee, that Patrick has the right to have the accounting approved and that the Trust is not ready for final distribution. The Petition for Instructions to Compel Trustee to Account was continued to January 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Freedman to reply to the response filed on November 27, 2013. Said reply is to be filed by January 6, 2014.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions To Compel Trustee To Account
